source.name: Level 4 Lab 0.1: Pipeline Config — Code Test
source.instructions:
Paste your completed **`config.yml`** and **`endpoints.yml`** from the fill-in-the-blanks exercise into **`level4/`**, save both files, then run this check.

• Check 1: `level4/config.yml` exists; **`assistant_id`** is **`level4-agent`**.
• Check 2: **`pipeline:`** uses **`CompactLLMCommandGenerator`** (not SearchReady).
• Check 3: **`minimize_num_calls: false`**; **`flow_retrieval`** has **`turns_to_embed: 5`**, **`num_flows: 20`**.
• Check 4: **`endpoints.yml`** has **`action_endpoint`**, **`nlg`** rephrase, **`model_group: openai-gpt-5-1`**.
• Check 5: **`model_groups`** for **`openai-gpt-5-1`** uses **`model: openai-gpt-5-1`**, **`temperature: 0.1`**.

Full score: 10/10.
source.guidance: Complete the blanks on the previous page, paste into `level4/config.yml` and `level4/endpoints.yml`, save, re-run.
